first_run_intro: To get started, you'll want to configure CMTY Studio's Loaded Data. Navigate to the Loaded Data pane and input your BG3 Installation folder (it should contain the /bin and /Data folders).
first_run_features_intro: From there, CMTY Studio can ingest the vanilla game data. You can optionally load in data from mods, either by selecting your mod's folder, or by selecting a .pak file or importing your current Load Order from modsettings. Doing so will unlock features like:
first_run_feature_diff: See exactly what your mod changes vs vanilla
first_run_feature_combobox: Type-ahead for UUIDs, tags, and IDs
first_run_without_data_heading: Without loading data, you can still:
first_run_can_manual: Manually create and edit mod entries
first_run_cta_text: Click Auto-Detect or Configure Manually below to get started, or skip for now to explore the application.
first_run_toast_warning_message: BG3 install not found — configure manually via settings.
first_run_toast_error_message: Could not search for BG3 install path.
first_run_project_folder_explanation: When opening a project, select the folder that contains your mod folder (e.g. the folder with Mods/, Public/, and your .gitignore). If you select the mod folder directly, CMTY Studio will set things up automatically.
create_mod_subtitle: Configure your new BG3 mod project
export_mod_no_files: No files to export. Load a mod and enable entries first.
mod_select_description: Multiple mods were detected in this project folder. Select which one to edit.
mod_select_no_mods: No mods found in the selected folder. The folder should contain a subfolder with Mods/ and Public/ directories.
duplicate_mod_description_uuid: A mod with the same UUID is already loaded. Click a card to select it, then confirm.
duplicate_mod_description_name: A mod with the same name is already loaded. Click a card to select it, then confirm.
settings_empty_state: Select a category from the sidebar to configure settings.
settings_theme_editor_instruction: Adjust colors and press "Apply" to save as a custom theme.
settings_display_zoom_instruction: Ctrl+= / Ctrl+- to zoom, Ctrl+0 to reset.
settings_display_show_names_desc: Show resolved names alongside UUIDs in dropdown options
settings_display_show_prefix_desc: Show [Vanilla] or [ModName] prefix on dropdown options
settings_display_auto_hide_tab_desc: Hide the tab bar when not hovered — hover the top edge to reveal
settings_mod_config_cf_desc: Generate CF config files for subclass and section changes
settings_mod_config_mcm_desc: Include Mod Configuration Menu integration for in-game settings
settings_schemas_mcm_desc: URL to the MCM blueprint JSON schema used for validation and editor support. Fetched when an internet connection is available.
settings_git_identity_help: Used for commit author. Falls back to global git config (~/.gitconfig) if left empty.
localization_empty_instruction: Click "Add File" to create a localization XML file.
loca_editor_invalid_xml: Invalid contentList XML — showing raw view
loca_editor_duplicate_error: Cannot save: duplicate contentuid + version pairs exist.
loca_editor_duplicate_warning: Duplicate contentuid + version pairs detected. Each combination must be unique.
loca_editor_no_entries: No entries. Click "Add Entry" to create one.
search_load_mod: Load a mod to search entries
search_type_hint: Type to search entries across all sections
header_vanilla_not_configured: Vanilla data not configured — combobox suggestions, diff detection, and new-vs-modified classification unavailable.
command_palette_placeholder: Search commands & entries… (# to filter by section)
command_palette_showing_first_20: Showing first 20 entry matches. Use # to filter by section.
command_palette_open_project: Open or create a project to continue.
command_palette_goto_row_placeholder: Type a row number to jump to…
command_palette_goto_field_placeholder: Type a field name to jump to…
section_panel_enable_all_tooltip: Enable all entries in this section
section_panel_disable_all_tooltip: Disable all entries — they will be commented out in the .lsx file
section_panel_reset_tooltip: Reset this section to its initial state
section_panel_reset_warning: Manual entries will be lost. Imported entries will be restored.
section_panel_vanilla_unavailable: Vanilla data unavailable for this section — combobox suggestions may be incomplete.
form_header_cf_blacklist_tooltip: CF Blacklist: When enabled, excludes this ClassDescription from CF subclass handling entirely. The Compatibility Framework will not inject subclasses into this class.
help_links_notice: Links open in your default browser.
output_scan_mod_hint: Load a mod to see LSX preview
meta_lsx_no_metadata: No mod metadata available. Load a mod to view its meta.lsx data.
meta_lsx_uuid_warning_message: Changing the UUID or Folder may cause issues for players who update from versions prior to this change. Their mod managers may treat this as a different mod entirely.
schema_form_no_vanilla: No vanilla schema data found for {section}. Provide entry attributes manually.
schema_form_child_groups_info: Child entries can be managed after creating the entry via the edit overlay.
section_accordion_step_open_menu: Open the menu to configure your vanilla game data path
section_accordion_step_browse: Use the Browse button or header bar to select a mod folder
section_accordion_step_scan: Click Load to import the mod's entries
section_accordion_supported_formats: Supported output formats: YAML and JSON — configurable in Settings.
section_accordion_command_palette_hint: Ctrl+Shift+P to open the command palette
section_accordion_no_sections_message: This mod has no matching CF sections.
section_accordion_parsing: Parsing files and comparing against vanilla data.
singleselect_no_matching: No matching options. Press Enter to use "{searchText}" as a custom value.
singleselect_showing_results: Showing {maxDisplayed} of {total} matches — type to narrow results
singleselect_not_found: Localized text not found. Input plain text to create a loca entry or select a different value.
group_header_toggle_all_title: Toggle all entries in this group
app_unsaved_changes_switch: You have unsaved changes that will be lost. Switch mods anyway?
app_unsaved_changes_exit: You have unsaved changes that will be lost. Exit mod anyway?
app_vanilla_not_configured: Vanilla data path not configured — loading will produce limited results.
app_unpacking_warnings_desc: The following warnings occurred during unpacking and file conversion. The unpacking may have completed successfully despite these warnings.
app_persist_failed_desc: Project data could not be saved to local storage. Your changes may be lost if you close the app.
loaded_data_auto_detect_tooltip: Auto-detect BG3 install path from Windows Registry
loaded_data_populate_confirm: This will reset reference databases (ref_base, ref_honor, ref_mods) to initial state. Staging data is preserved. Continue?
loaded_data_additional_mods_desc: Additional mods are used for diff comparisons and combobox population. They are not scanned as the primary mod.
loaded_data_import_tooltip: Import active .pak mods from %LOCALAPPDATA%\Larian Studios\Baldur's Gate 3\Mods
loaded_data_reset_complete: Reference databases reset to initial state
welcome_app_subtitle: Community Mod Authoring Studio for Baldur's Gate 3
welcome_open_desc: Select a project folder containing your mod
welcome_folder_help_body: Select the folder that contains your mod folder. Your mod folder is the one with Mods/ and Public/ inside it.
welcome_folder_help_auto_correct: If you select your mod folder directly, CMTY Studio will automatically set up the project structure around it.
welcome_folder_help_new_mod: New mod? Use "New Project" to create the correct structure from scratch.
welcome_no_mods_body: The selected folder doesn't appear to contain a mod. Make sure it contains a subfolder with a Mods/ directory and a meta.lsx file inside it.
welcome_no_mods_hint: Common fix: try selecting the parent folder instead.
welcome_select_section: Select a section from the Explorer panel to begin.
entry_row_vanilla_tooltip: Vanilla entry — click Edit to override
entry_row_disabled_tooltip: This entry will be commented out in the .lsx file
entry_row_hidden_tooltip: Hidden from Player — click to unhide
entry_row_visible_tooltip: Visible to Player — click to hide
entry_diff_new_label: New entry — not present in vanilla
data_op_cancelled: Operation cancelled (backend may still finish in background)
import_staging_warnings_detail: {file_errors} file error(s), {row_errors} row error(s) during restore of {mod_name}
import_no_pak_files_load_order: No .pak files found in BG3 Mods directory.
import_no_active_mods: No active mods found ({total_paks} total .pak files, {active_count} active in modsettings.lsx).
scan_staging_warnings_detail: {file_errors} file error(s), {row_errors} row error(s) — some entries may be missing.
scan_staging_population_failed_detail: Could not populate staging from mod files: {error}
scan_loca_map_empty: Localization map is empty — loca comboboxes will have no vanilla suggestions. Ensure vanilla data has been unpacked.
scan_loca_parse_issues_detail: {count} file(s) had parse errors — some entries may be missing.
scan_mod_loca_parse_detail: {count} file(s) had parse errors — some entries may be missing.
app_select_project_folder: Select Project Folder (contains your mod's Mods/ and Public/ folders)
command_palette_help_goto_row_desc: Jump to an entry by row number
command_palette_help_goto_field_desc: Jump to a specific field in the form
command_palette_help_section_filter_desc: Filter data entries by section name
command_palette_help_search_desc: Search entries by name, UUID, or field values
tag_tooltip_new: New: This entry has been introduced by the active mod
tag_tooltip_edit: Edited: This entry differs from the mod's unpacked files
tag_tooltip_dup: Duplicate: This entry matches the mod's unpacked files exactly
tag_tooltip_imp: Imported: Entries from a pre-existing configuration file
tag_tooltip_warn: Warning: This entry has validation issues — check details
tag_tooltip_err: Error: This entry has configuration errors that must be fixed
tag_tooltip_mod: Modified: This entry has unsaved changes
tag_tooltip_ovrd: Override: This entry overrides vanilla or loaded mod data
error_schema_db_not_found: Schema database not found: {path}. Build ref_base.sqlite first.
save_summary_created: Created ({count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}})
save_summary_updated: Updated ({count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}})
save_summary_deleted: Deleted ({count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}})
save_summary_unchanged: Unchanged: {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}}
save_summary_dry_run_notice: This is a preview — no files were written.
export_pak_priority_tooltip: Load priority (0 = lowest, higher overrides lower). User mods typically use 0.
se_test_guide_section1_desc: Script Extender is required for all SE-based mods.
se_config_mod_table_hint: Lua identifier for this mod's table name (e.g., MyAwesomeMod)
se_config_preload_hint: Load this mod before the game starts (rare, most mods don't need this)
se_config_invalid_json: Invalid JSON — fix errors before switching to form view
se_config_mod_table_invalid: ModTable must be a valid Lua identifier (letters, digits, underscores; cannot start with a digit)
script_creation_exists: A file with this name already exists
file_explorer_rename_xref_warning: Other scripts that reference this file by path (e.g. Ext.Require) were not auto-updated. Check imports manually.
pre_export_validation_errors_block: Export blocked — fix errors before saving
mcm_editor_fix_json: Invalid JSON — fix errors before switching to form view
git_no_mod_loaded: Open a mod folder to use Git.
git_init_prompt: This mod folder is not a Git repository. Initialize one to start tracking changes.
git_cmd_no_other_branches: No other local branches to switch to.
git_cmd_base_branch_prompt: Base branch or commit to create from:
git_force_push_confirm: Force push will overwrite remote history. Continue?
git_stash_drop_confirm: Drop this stash entry? This cannot be undone.
git_conflict_banner_message: {count} file(s) have merge conflicts that must be resolved
git_conflict_resolved_hint: Stage resolved files to mark conflicts as resolved
git_set_name_prompt: Enter your Git commit author name:
git_set_email_prompt: Enter your Git commit author email:
settings_scripts_ide_helpers_desc: Select a folder containing Lua helper definition files to supplement intellisense. All .lua files in the folder are parsed for function signatures, global variables, and table fields.
settings_scripts_template_folder_desc: Path to a folder containing additional script templates organized by category subdirectories (lua, khonsu, anubis, constellations).
settings_no_project_open: No project open — settings are global
texture_atlas_warn_uneven_division: Atlas size {w}×{h} does not divide evenly by icon size {iw}×{ih}
texture_atlas_warn_capacity_exceeded: {count} icons defined but atlas can only fit {capacity}
texture_atlas_warn_dimension_mismatch: Atlas dimensions ({w}×{h}) do not match DDS file ({dw}×{dh})
nexus_api_key_placeholder: Paste your Nexus Mods API key
nexus_api_key_link: Get your API key at nexusmods.com →
nexus_open_project_for_settings: Open a project to configure mod-specific Nexus settings.
nexus_error_invalid_api_key: The API key is invalid or expired. Check your key at nexusmods.com.
nexus_error_mod_not_found: Could not find a mod matching that URL or ID.
common_error_network: A network error occurred. Check your connection and try again.
modio_get_token_link: Get your access token at mod.io →
modio_disconnect_confirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect from mod.io?
modio_token_hint: Generate an OAuth2 Access Token at mod.io/me/access with read + write scope, then paste it below.
modio_token_expiry_warning: Token expires in {days} days — generate a new token soon
modio_token_expired: Token expired — please generate a new token at mod.io/me/access
modio_dashboard_empty: No mods found. Create your first mod on mod.io to get started.
